subcodes.first_line: The Word of God, should it be made manifest from its horizon, thou wouldst behold it even as the sun in its splendor and as a blazing fire; at times We behold it flowing forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لله کلمه لو تظهر من افقها تراها کالشمس مشرقه و کالنار مشتعله مره نراها جاریه
